name: avatar-builder
description: Interview a builder, then produce THREE distinct, prioritized customer avatars at equal depth — each a named persona with demographics, motivations (jobs-to-be-done), fears/desires, acute problem, current alternatives, their language, a prioritized channel map, anti-fit, one-line thesis, riskiest assumption, and 3 strategic moves — ranked Primary/Secondary/Tertiary so you know who to lead with.
